ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Game Variety, Payment Options) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to categorize features */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider (e.g., Microgaming, NetEnt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to categorize providers */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Provider's website URL */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the provider is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_providers" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "detail_name" TEXT /* Name of the detail (e.g., Examples, Availability) */,
  "detail_value" TEXT /* Value of the detail */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature detail is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_details_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popular_providers" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the popular provider */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the popularity of the provider for a feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the popularity was last updated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the popularity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id", "provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_features" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the feature (e.g., Wide, Diverse) */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of the feature (e.g., Slots, Blackjack, Poker) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is currently active for the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "feature_id")
)
